calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Mercy Housing is present. Represented by Sandy Carol.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Lorraine Meyeraan, is present.
Attorney, Theodore Janowsky , representing the defendant through full scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-30-2010 is vacated.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. THEODORE M. JANOWSKI OF THE HOMELESSS ADVOCACY PROJECT, TEL. NO. 865-9209 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT LORRAINE MEYERAAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 473 (b) IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. RESPONSIVE PLEADING TO BE FILED BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS DAY OF AUGUST 4, 2010. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
